items.title: Ontluisterend Feyenoord lijdt in Enschede zevende competitienederlaag
items.summary: Feyenoord is zondag tegen de zevende competitienederlaag van het seizoen aangelopen. Uit bij FC Twente had de ploeg van Robin van Persie helemaal niets te vertellen.

items.title: Uitvak scandeert 'schaam je kapot' als Ajacieden fans komen bedanken
items.summary: Ajax liep ook tegen PEC Zwolle averij op. Hier lees je alles terug over het bloedeloze gelijkspel.

items.title: VI Live: FC Volendam verdedigt voorsprong, horrorminuut helpt Man Utd in het zadel
items.summary: Zondag staan er liefst vijf Eredivisie-duels op de rol. Ajax en Feyenoord hebben een apart liveblog. Hier volg je onder meer de ontmoeting tussen FC Utrecht en AZ. Arsenal ontvangt Chelsea en in Italië staan AS Roma en Juventus tegenover elkaar. Volg het in de VI Live.

items.title: 'Ik had nooit verwacht teleurgesteld te zijn met een punt tegen Ajax'
items.summary: Henry van der Vegt is teleurgesteld met een punt tegen Ajax. Volgens de trainer van PEC Zwolle waren de grootste kansen zondagmiddag voor zijn elftal.

items.title: Manchester United v Crystal Palace: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Premier League updates from the 2pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Tables | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail Daniel We will, of course, be updating you on this afternoon’s other early games: Brighton v Forest and Fulham v Spurs, but here’s Carrick. So where is the game? Well, United will have to adjust a little, given they’re starting with a centre-forward; with Palace likely to defend deep and centrally, a reference-point will probably be a help. I’d expect Mbeumo to step inside on to his left foot and try and pick him out with crosses to the back post, because if he times it, he’s almost unbeatable in the air. Otherwise, I’d expect them to play into Bruno, who’ll slip passes down the sides of the outside centre-backs, with the two wide players looking to hit the space behind the wing-backs. Continue reading...

items.title: Waarom Ajax niet met Weghorst én Dolberg voor de winnende goal ging
items.summary: Hoewel Ajax een doelpunt nodig had, besloot Fred Grim zondag tegen PEC Zwolle niet met zowel Wout Weghorst als Kasper Dolberg de slotfase in te gaan. Na afloop legde de trainer uit waarom hij de Nederlander wisselde voor de Deen.

items.title: Super League: Bradford vs Toulouse latest score
Pulisic's Milan score late double, 10 pts off Inter
items.summary: AC Milan needed two late goals to secure a 2-0 win at Cremonese in Serie A on Sunday and bounce back from its second loss of the season.

items.title: Madrid 'clear' on Mbappé, but doubt for City clash
items.summary: Coach Álvaro Arbeloa said on Sunday that Real Madrid are "very clear" about Kylian Mbappé's knee problem but admitted he is a doubt to face Manchester City.

items.title: Amorim assistant: United ideas 'not implemented'
items.summary: Ruben Amorim needed more time at Manchester United to "implement his ideas," according to one of his assistants at Old Trafford.

items.title: Kane eyes Lewa goal record after Klassiker brace
items.summary: Harry Kane is targeting Robert Lewandowski's Bundesliga record of 41 goals in a season after notching another two in Bayern Munich's 3-2 win over Borussia Dortmund on Saturday.

items.title: Premier League live updates: Man United draw level against 10-man Crystal Palace
Reo Hatate grabs Celtic a draw at Rangers to leave Hearts as real winners
items.summary: The winners of this Old Firm match were 40 miles away in Edinburgh. Hearts’ hopes of claiming the Scottish title for the first time since 1960 were boosted by Reo Hatate’s late equaliser for Celtic, which only epitomised a disastrous second half for Rangers. Hearts lead Rangers by six and Celtic by eight, albeit the Hoops have played one game fewer. This outcome had seemed unfathomable at half-time. Rangers were dominant in the opening period. Ultimately, they suffered from not adding to a two-goal lead. Celtic were as improved post-interval as Rangers were dreadful. The result was therefore fair. Continue reading...

items.title: Hatate rescues Celtic in Old Firm classic
items.summary: Reo Hatate scored a late equaliser to rescue a point for Celtic as they came from two goals down to draw 2-2 with Rangers in a pulsating Old Firm clash at Ibrox.

items.title: Peter Fury to train Verhoeven ahead of Usyk fight
items.summary: Peter Fury has confirmed he will be involved in Rico Verhoeven's training camp ahead of his shock fight with Oleksandr Usyk on May 23.

items.title: Fernandes pulls Man Utd level from spot vs Palace as Lacroix sent off LIVE!

How do Lionesses solve full-back succession problem?
items.summary: Will the Lionesses find a solution for their full-back problem in time for the 2027 Women's World Cup?

items.title: Woodman’s quiet revolution paying dividends for table-topping Bromley
items.summary: The south-east London club have promotion to League One within sight in just their second season in the EFL with their manager central to the transformation With half an hour to go before kick-off , a roar echoes round the ground. MK Dons have levelled with Cambridge United via a penalty deep into injury time, Aaron Collins scoring from the spot to deny the hosts victory. In the 20-minute interlude between Shayne Lavery’s opener at the Abbey Stadium and the referee’s fateful whistle, Cambridge looked set to go top of the table. Instead Bromley get under way against Accrington Stanley with a one-point lead at the summit of League Two, much to the relief of the home fans. Continue reading...
